name: Aaron Diehl
abstract: Aaron Diehl (; born September 22, 1985) is an American jazz pianist and composer. He was the 2014 Monterey Jazz Festival Commission Artist and composed Three Streams of Expression, dedicated to pianist and composer John Lewis.

about_quotes.evidence: Aaron Diehl, a tremendous young stride piano player, a bebop piano player/arranger, started out as a classical player until college
